title: Need help in filter functionality of monday.com
excerpt:
I need your help in filter option of monday.com, I am able to filter out items one by one and it’s time consuming. 
My need is to filter approximately 50 different items out of 4000, so can you suggest me how to do in on…

posts.author: dhawlandra382 (Dhawlandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need your help in filter option of monday.com, I am able to filter out items one by one and it’s time consuming.

My need is to filter approximately 50 different items out of 4000, so can you suggest me how to do in one go.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dhawlandra382 !

Would you mind providing more information about your use case so I can give you proper guidance on the filter?

Thanks!
